issues.detail: The skill examples cover only common cases and lack comprehensive error handling for all edge scenarios.
The skill is tightly coupled to Val Town's platform and cannot be used with other AI agents or deployment environments.

scenarios.name: Tiny todo CRUD REST API with persistent storage, no infra
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for Vercel/Workers/Deno Deploy plus an external DB and misses Val Town's built-in sqlite import URL and HTTP val signature, while treatment uses the documented esm.town/v/std/sqlite import with the exact Request-in/Response-out CRUD handler.

scenarios.name: Daily 9am Slack report cron without managing servers
scenarios.rationale: Baseline defaults to GitHub Actions or Lambda+EventBridge rather than a Val Town cron val, while treatment uses the documented argumentless export default async function pattern with Deno.env.get for the Slack webhook secret.
